{{Infobox character
| name = Harriford Wells
| aliases = Wells
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Harriford Wells]] is the leader of a brigand gang that took over [[Dalton Foster]]'s town.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Wells is a bandit leader.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Harriford Wells]] is the only person in the world with an [[Awakened gun]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Wells is the leader of a gang that holds an entire town captive.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
